text: Direction Fabric must not add more lifecycle features until agents can discover and use the protocol through root AGENTS.md, current-thread defaults, fabric status, and low-friction sync/note commands.

Fabric must make direction propagation work across separate agent threads and worktrees; if repo-local git-backed storage is the sync mechanism, the tracked/ignored .fabric policy and agent protocol must not silently isolate direction per worktree.

Fabric now uses a git-common shared event mirror so sibling worktrees can see new direction before the durable .fabric/ledger/events.jsonl changes are committed; local current-thread and generated checkpoint files remain per-worktree state.
